# ToolRoute
> The OpenRouter for tools — MCP-native capability registry and intelligent librarian

## What this site does
ToolRoute is the OpenRouter for tools. It provides an MCP-native capability registry and intelligent librarian that helps AI agents discover and use the right tools. Query 50+ curated best-in-class tools before building anything.

## Key pages
- https://toolroute.ai: Main tool registry and search
- https://toolroute.ai/docs: Documentation

## API
MCP-native API for tool discovery and routing

## Contact
support@toolroute.ai
